name: Ann Arbor, MI
jurisdiction: City of Ann Arbor / Washtenaw County

documents.title: Plastic Bottles (#1 PET)
documents.instructions: Empty, rinse, and place in the recycling bin. Caps can stay on.

documents.title: Aluminum Cans
documents.instructions: Empty and rinse. Place in recycling bin.
documents.notes: Michigan 10-cent deposit — return to a bottle return for refund.

documents.title: Cardboard & Paperboard
documents.instructions: Flatten boxes. Remove packing materials. Place in recycling bin.

documents.title: Glass Bottles & Jars
documents.instructions: Empty and rinse. Place in recycling bin.
documents.notes: Michigan bottle deposit applies to most beverage containers.

documents.title: Food Scraps & Compostables
documents.instructions: Ann Arbor offers curbside compost collection — place in the compost cart.
documents.notes: One of the first US cities with municipal compost pickup.

documents.title: Styrofoam / Expanded Polystyrene
documents.instructions: Not accepted in curbside recycling. Place in trash cart.

documents.title: Plastic Bags & Film
documents.instructions: Do NOT place in curbside bins. Take to a store drop-off.

documents.title: Batteries
documents.instructions: Take to Washtenaw County Home Toxics disposal or a retailer drop-off.
